name: Deductions in Respect of a Decedent (DRD)

eligibility.description: The person or estate must be the one who pays the obligation or receives the income to which the deduction relates.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows the estate or a beneficiary to claim deductions for expenses (Sec. 162, 163, 164, 212) or depletion (Sec. 611) that the decedent was entitled to but did not claim before death.
